title: Portuguese Flaky Crusted Oatmeal Wrap
description: A unique breakfast wrap recipe combining the crunch of flaky pastry with the warmth of oatmeal, perfect for a cozy morning.
instructions: In a bowl, mix together oatmeal, egg, milk, sugar, vanilla, and cinnamon.
Place the flaky pastry on a baking sheet.
Spread the oatmeal mixture evenly over the pastry, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Fold the edges of the pastry up to create a crust.
Brush the crust with melted butter.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
Serve in a wrap with your favorite fillings.
